FGO_SETTINGS_UI_BASE_NP_PER_COST.title: NP Gain per Cost
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_BASE_NP_PER_COST.hover.d: How much Noble Phantasm Gauge you gain for each point of energy spent on non-NP cards.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_COLORLESS_CARDS.h: Adds colorless cards to the card pool. Requires a game restart to take effect.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_PADORU.title: Enable Christmas Easter Egg
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_FTUE.title: Enable Ftue
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_FTUE.hover.desc: Enables the first-time user experience tutorial.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_NO_COST_NOBLE_PHA: Enable No Cost Noble Phantasm (Requires game restart)
Makes Noble Phantasm cards cost 0 energy. Requires a game restart to take effect.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENEMIES.title: Enemies
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_ENEMIES.title: Enable Enemies (Requires game restart)
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_ENEMIES.hover.des: Master toggle for all FGO enemy encounters. Requires a game restart to take effect.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_EMIYA.title: Emiya
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_EMIYA.hover.desc: Enable Emiya as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_CALAMITY_OF_NORWI: Enable Calamity of Norwich as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_CERNUNNOS.title: Cernunnos
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_CERNUNNOS.hover.d: Enable Cernunnos as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_FAERIE_KNIGHT_GAW: Enable Faerie Knight Gawain as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_FAERIE_KNIGHT_LAN: Enable Faerie Knight Lancelot as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_MOSS.title: Moss
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_MOSS.hover.desc: Enable Moss as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_ENABLE_QUEEN_MORGAN.hove: Enable Queen Morgan as an enemy encounter. Requires 'Enable Enemies' to be on.
FGO_SETTINGS_UI_GENERAL.title: BaseSetting
